name: delivery-cash-edit-report-refresh-fix
summary: Fixes stale report cash/bank values after editing a pending delivery cash submission by rebuilding the report snapshot from the current delivery orders, preserving submitted amounts, patching the original voucher, and preventing date/staff collisions.
rootCause: updateDeliveryCashSubmission only changed submitted amounts and recalculated differences against the stored report snapshot; it never rebuilt reportCashAmount/reportBankAmount/order lineage from the current delivery data.

tests.fullSuite: not completed: node_modules are not installed in the patch sandbox
